---
title : Figure 13.1
subtitle : Zero-th order optimization
author : Thimoté Dupuch
date : today
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
    theme:
      light: zephyr
      dark: darkly
engine: julia
---

```{julia}
#| echo : false
#| output : false
using Pkg; Pkg.activate("../.."); Pkg.status()
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
using CairoMakie, Statistics, Random, LinearAlgebra
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
#| echo : false
CairoMakie.set_theme!(theme_latexfonts())
CairoMakie.activate!(type = "svg")
```

```{julia}
#| output : false
blue, orange, green, pink, teal, red, yellow = Makie.wong_colors()
```

```{julia}
Random.seed!(1)

d = 10
H_raw = randn(d, d)
F = svd(H_raw)
u = F.U
H = u * Diagonal(1 ./ (1:d)) * u'
L = maximum(real.(eigvals(H)))

theta_ast = randn(d)
maxiter = 100000
deltas = [0.01, 0.1, 10.0]
nrep = 10

function simulate_zero_order(
        H, L, theta_ast, sigma, maxiter, deltas, nrep
    )
    d = length(theta_ast)
    val_zero = zeros(length(deltas), maxiter, nrep)
    val_zero_ave = zeros(length(deltas), maxiter, nrep)

    for (idelta, delta) in enumerate(deltas)
        for irep = 1:nrep
            w = zeros(d)
            wave = zeros(d)
            for iter = 1:maxiter
                diff = w - theta_ast
                val_zero[idelta, iter, irep] = 0.5 * dot(diff, H, diff)

                diff_ave = wave - theta_ast
                val_zero_ave[idelta, iter, irep] = 0.5 * dot(diff_ave, H, diff_ave)

                z = randn(d)
                diff1 = w + delta * z - theta_ast
                temp1 = 0.5 * dot(diff1, H, diff1)
                temp2 = val_zero[idelta, iter, irep]

                w = w - 1/(4 * L * d) * (temp1 - temp2 + randn() * sigma) / delta * z
                wave = (1 - 1/iter) * wave + w/iter
            end
        end
    end
    return val_zero, val_zero_ave
end

sigma_1 = 0.01
val_zero_1, val_zero_ave_1 = simulate_zero_order(
    H, L, theta_ast, sigma_1, maxiter, deltas, nrep
)

sigma_2 = 0.1
val_zero_2, val_zero_ave_2 = simulate_zero_order(
    H, L, theta_ast, sigma_2, maxiter, deltas, nrep
)

fig = Figure(size = (1200, 800))

# Row 1: sigma = 0.01
for (i, delta) in enumerate(deltas)
    ax = Axis(fig[1, i],
              title = L"\delta = %$(delta) - \sigma = %$(sigma_1)",
              xlabel = "# iterations",
              ylabel = L"F(\theta)-F(\theta_*)")

    y_zero = log10.(dropdims(mean(val_zero_1[i, :, :], dims=2), dims=2))
    y_zero_ave = log10.(dropdims(mean(val_zero_ave_1[i, :, :], dims=2), dims=2))

    lines!(ax, 1:maxiter, y_zero, color=blue, linewidth=2, label="no averaging")
    lines!(ax, 1:maxiter, y_zero_ave, color=red, linewidth=2, label="averaging")
    ylims!(ax, -5, 1.5)
    xlims!(ax, 0, maxiter)

    if i == 3
        axislegend(ax, position = :rb)
    else
        axislegend(ax, position = :rt)
    end
end

# Row 2: sigma = 0.1
for (i, delta) in enumerate(deltas)
    ax = Axis(fig[2, i],
              title = L"\delta = %$(delta) - \sigma = %$(sigma_2)",
              xlabel = "# iterations",
              ylabel = L"F(\theta)-F(\theta_*)")

    y_zero = log10.(dropdims(mean(val_zero_2[i, :, :], dims=2), dims=2))
    y_zero_ave = log10.(dropdims(mean(val_zero_ave_2[i, :, :], dims=2), dims=2))

    lines!(ax, 1:maxiter, y_zero, color=blue, linewidth=2, label="no averaging")
    lines!(ax, 1:maxiter, y_zero_ave, color=red, linewidth=2, label="averaging")
    ylims!(ax, -5, 1.5)
    xlims!(ax, 0, maxiter)

    if i == 1 || i == 3
        axislegend(ax, position = :rb)
    else
        axislegend(ax, position = :rt)
    end
end

fig
```
